item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:hot","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"Rendering requires contact FOR-SOME-TIME and only asserts something very bad in a body part, so revise the gloss to sustained contact and bodily harm or strengthen those clauses."}
